Cafe Brand Systems

Three cafes.
Three completely different worlds.

Each identity was built from scratch — distinct tone, palette, typography, and brand logic. Scroll through to feel the difference.

01 — Cafe Avisha

Authentic.
Golden.
Home.

Tone

Authentic, golden, earthy, and a little antique-house. The identity leans into bronze warmth, heritage textures, and hospitality cues that feel like stepping into a familiar old home with polished service.

Golden Earth Palette Antique Cafe Mood Uniform System Launch Assets
02 — Café Del Carmen

Luxury.
Modern.
High-End.

✦
Tone

Luxury, modern, and high-end. The monogram-led system uses gold restraint, espresso depth, and cleaner spacing to make the cafe feel refined without becoming cold.

Monogram Mark Luxury Cafe Tone Packaging Direction Modern Polish
03 — Carmen's Garden Cafe

Garden.
Peace.
Fresh.

Tone

Green, peaceful, fresh, and garden-led. This identity shows a softer side of the portfolio — natural cues, lighter pacing, and a brand world that feels calm, welcoming, and breathable.

Garden Identity Fresh Palette Peaceful Cafe Tone Visual Rules
